prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GTX4202R with billet compressor wheel (52mm inducer, 71mm exducer) and 64mm turbine wheel, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a PWR intercooler (450x650x76mm core) for the 3.2L MZ-CD (RF) turbodiesel engine, supporting 350hp and 800Nm torque with a 2.5-bar MAP sensor upgrade and Motec M150 ECU reflash for fueling and timing optimization

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a PP Tech billet aluminum transfer case brace, Southside Machine Engineering 300M axle shafts (35 spline), and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part # QDF7J) for the rear Dana M80 differential, paired with a custom 4.56:1 gear set from Revolution Gear & Axle for improved acceleration

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 100mm travel) and custom-valved front struts, paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (part # SPF0116K) for the front control arms and a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar (part # BTR75Z) to reduce body roll, complemented by a PP Tech front upper strut brace for chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works BT-50 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and rear diffuser), extended 50mm per side with custom steel flares for a 215/60R17 front and 275/55R17 rear tire fitment on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +18 front, 17x10.5 +25 rear)

Full carbon fiber aero package including a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with integrated venting for intercooler airflow), a custom 3D-printed front splitter (20mm overhang, 3mm thick aluminum reinforcement), and a custom rear wing (3-piece carbon fiber, 1.2m span, adjustable angle via billet aluminum mounts) from APR Performance (part # W-72)

Interior overhaul with Recaro SPG XL seats (part # 385202) mounted on custom aluminum brackets for lowered seating position, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (part # SRK-200B) and a Momo Prototipo 350mm suede wheel, complemented by a full Alcantara headliner and door cards from Katzkin (part # MAZ-BT50-ALC)
